Prompt
U
Oracle Events
Use contacts_search_contacts to load Elena Rostova's profile so write actions use correct executive context.
Use quickbooks_search_bills with Heartland and HM-2026-Q1-0042 to capture billed totals and line items for the Q1 invoice.
Use airtable_search_records or airtable_get_record on tblRelocations01 for RELOC-2026-009 (rec_reloc_marchetti), RELOC-2026-010 (rec_reloc_osei), and RELOC-2026-015 (rec_reloc_venkatesh). Confirm RELOC-2026-009: Lily Marchetti, Cancelled, Heartland, Nashville to Chicago, coordinator Blessing Okafor. Confirm RELOC-2026-010: Danielle Osei, Cancelled, Heartland, Phoenix to Denver, coordinator Javier Morales. Confirm RELOC-2026-015: Priya Venkatesh, Completed, carrier Swift Relocations not Heartland, Houston to Seattle, coordinator Fatimah Al-Rashidi (vendor mismatch, not cancellation).
Use search_emails and get_email_threads or get_thread on Heartland dispute threads to confirm February cancellation notices to Heartland where applicable and no acknowledgment from Heartland on the dispute.
Use quickbooks_search_bills for Mosaic damage accrual (e.g. bill_mosaic_damage_accrual_001) to confirm the ninety thousand dollar on-books contingent accrual, the fifty thousand per item coverage cap, and the forty thousand dollar remaining uninsured gap on the bill line.
Use crm_search_deals with company_id company_mosaic and dealname filters for Mosaic damage or Zara Okoye and crm_list_engagements with company_ids including company_mosaic to ground the prototype damage claim narrative (deal and engagement notes, AM logging) against the Mosaic accrual bill.
Use linear_list_issues with project project_dot_compliance_audit and/or team team_operations to identify the four in-scope DOT documentation moves and the Keiko Tanaka Mosaic workstream with the blocking placarding certificate gap involving Swift Relocations.
Use quickbooks_search_bills for the DOT penalty accrual (e.g. bill_dot_penalty_accrual_q2) to confirm the fifty thousand dollar placeholder tied to PHMSA case PHMSA-2026-04-1187.
Use conversations_search_messages and search_emails to determine who on MoveOps already flagged each of the three risks and when.
Use quickbooks_get_bill with id bill_heartland_q1_2026_hold (DocNumber HM-2026-Q1-0042-HOLD), id bill_mosaic_damage_accrual_001, and id bill_dot_penalty_accrual_q2 to sum the three DISPUTED Heartland lines at sixteen hundred each (four thousand eight hundred total), read the Mosaic accrual versus forty thousand uncovered gap after the fifty thousand cap, read the fifty thousand DOT PHMSA placeholder line, and verify the three exposure components sum to ninety four thousand eight hundred.
Use send_email to marcus.thorne@moveops.com, chloe.vance@moveops.com, and hana.kim@moveops.com with elena.rostova@moveops.com in CC; compose the body from verified tool outputs and the asks in the user prompt.
Use linear_list_issues or linear_get_issue scoped to project project_dot_compliance_audit or team team_operations to find an urgent operations issue for Keiko Tanaka retroactive placarding documentation from Swift Relocations (e.g. issue_dot_tanaka_subtask_swift_cert). If none exists, use linear_create_issue with team team_operations, assignee Chloe Vance, project project_dot_compliance_audit, and title and description scoped to that placarding certificate gap so one accountable ops ticket owns the documentation closure.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

1 The final response states that the Heartland Q1 overbilling amount is approximately $4,800.
outcome
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%

✓Run #2The final response explicitly states '$4,800 confirmed overbilling (3 invalid lines on HM-2026-Q1-0042)' in the Heartland section.
✓Run #3The final response explicitly states '$4,800 confirmed overbilling on invoice HM-2026-Q1-0042 (3 invalid line items: 2 cancelled moves, 1 completed by Swift).' The $4,800 figure is prominently mentioned.
✓Run #4The final response explicitly states '$4,800 confirmed overbilling (3 invalid line items on $12,800 invoice HM-2026-Q1-0042)'. The QuickBooks data confirms 3 disputed lines at $1,600 each = $4,800.
✓Run #5The final response explicitly states '$4,800 confirmed overbilling across 3 invalid line items' under the Heartland Q1 Bill Dispute section.
✓Run #6The final response explicitly states '$4,800 confirmed overbilling (3 invalid lines on invoice HM-2026-Q1-0042)' under the Heartland issue.
2 The final response attributes the Heartland Q1 disputed lines to the cancelled Lily Marchetti and Danielle Osei moves and to Priya Venkatesh's move being serviced by Swift Relocations instead of Heartland (or equivalent vendor-mismatch explanation).
outcome

3 The final response states that the Mosaic prototype uninsured exposure is approximately $40,000 based on a $90,000 item value and a $50,000 vendor liability cap.
outcome
 ✓—✓✓✓✓ 100%

outcome

11 The send_email body lists the three issues in descending order from highest to lowest thirty-day financial exposure.
outcome
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
